form.title: Contact Style 1 - Contact Form & Map
form.sampledata: {":type":"ja_ngr:contact","contact":{"jatools-layout-contact":"style-1","contact[contact-item]":{"contact[contact-item][icon]":["fa fa-map-marker","fa fa-phone","fa fa-envelope","fa fa-clock"],"contact[contact-item][label]":["Adresă","Telefon","Email","Program"],"contact[contact-item][value]":["Strada Exemplu 123, Chișinău","(+373) 60 123 456","contact@rentautopark.md","Luni - Vineri: 08:00 - 20:00"],"rows":4,"cols":3,"type":"list"}}}

fieldset.name: Basic Settings
fieldset.description: Basic settings for the contact component

field.name: form-enabled
field.label: Form Enabled
field.description: Enable or disable the contact form

field.name: map-enabled
field.label: Map Enabled
field.description: Enable or disable the map section

item.name: icon
item.label: Contact Icon
item.description: Icon class for the contact item (e.g., fa fa-map-marker)
